arts.ttl: Maresca happy with Chelsea’s transfer business
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca has insisted he is happy with Chelsea’s business during the transfer window. There were a number of pre-deadline outgoings, with Ben Chilwell, Axel Disasi, Carney Chukwuemeka and Renato Veiga all leaving on loan, while Cesare Casadei was sold to Torino. As the deadline passed, it was also expected that Joao Felix’s loan move […] The post Maresca happy with Chelsea’s transfer business appeared first on West London Sport.

arts.ttl: 'Something special' – McCoist hails West Ham star after what he did v Chelsea
arts.sum: Jarrod Bowen gives West Ham United “something special” after scoring on his return to the side against Chelsea, Ally McCoist has said. Speaking on talkSPORT... The post 'Something special' – McCoist hails West Ham star after what he did v Chelsea appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Enzo Maresca explains the main reason why win vs West Ham is 'huge' for Chelsea, 'it's not easy'
Enzo Maresca's genius nine-minute Chelsea change answers brutal 10-word Gary Neville statement - Bobby Vincent - football.london
arts.sum: Another very fortunate goal but those pieces of luck have not been going Chelsea's way recently - so they are more than welcome for Maresca and his players. Jarrod Bowen had given the visiting Hammers, managed by former Blues head coach Graham Potter, the lead at half-time with the England international firing into the bottom corner after a mistake from Levi Colwill .

arts.ttl: Filip Jorgensen was a signing for the future but now needs to speed up his progress after Enzo Maresca dropped Robert Sanchez, writes KIERAN GILL
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL AT STAMFORD BRIDGE: West Ham fans refer to trips to Chelsea as 'David Martin Day' - a nod to when the son of Hammers legend Alvin replaced the hapless Roberto in goal.

arts.ttl: I was at Stamford Bridge and saw Enzo Maresca create big issue for Nicolas Jackson in Chelsea’s win - opinion
arts.sum: Chelsea regained their place in the top four of the Premier League with a hard-fought 2-1 win over West Ham at Stamford Bridge. Goals from...

arts.ttl: Gary Neville slams VAR's Chelsea decisions as two calls leave Graham Potter furious
arts.sum: Chelsea prevailed over West Ham in the Premier League but were perhaps fortunate that Pedro Neto's equalising goal was awarded at Stamford Bridge after a foul on Jarrod Bowen was overlooked

arts.ttl: Tuesday's Transfer Talk Update: Maldini Kacurri, Stefanos Tzimas, Carney Chukwuemeka
arts.sum: Sports Mole rounds up the latest confirmed transfer news and speculation from across the footballing world.

arts.ttl: Chelsea’s final January transfer to be completed TODAY
arts.sum: The January transfer window has now closed but AC Milan will still complete the loan signing of Joao Felix on Tuesday. Eyebrows were raised when the transfer deadline came and went without Joao Felix's move to Milan being announced but the deal will go through as planned on Tuesday.

arts.ttl: Exclusive: Chelsea stance to see them miss out on “new Marcelo” and Arsenal will take full advantage
arts.sum: Chelsea’s habit of buying players only to immediately send them on loan to Strasbourg will see Enzo Maresca miss out on signing a brilliant Brazilian. Sources have told CaughtOffside that the Blues have been scouting the “new Marcelo” for quite some time, but there would appear to be little chance of the club being able […] The post Exclusive: Chelsea stance to see them miss out on “new Marcelo” and Arsenal will take full advantage appeared first on CaughtOffside.
